title: Are we in a debt crisis?
section_path: Are we in a debt crisis?
section_path_text: Are we in a debt crisis?
summary:
Main
The three things investors need to know this week:
Equity markets remain near all-time highs, but bond market volatility is rising. This is happening because bonds are more sensitive to inflation, and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz is beginning to cause rising prices across the globe. Strategically and tactically the debt backdrop is not easy.
